---
name: Development Task
description: Track development tasks and technical work
title: "[TASK]: "
labels: ["task", "ready-for-dev"]
assignees: ""
---

## Task Description
<!-- Clear description of what needs to be done -->

## Context & Rationale
<!-- Why is this task important? What business value does it provide? -->

## Technical Implementation Details
<!-- Technical approach and implementation plan -->

### Files to Modify
- [ ] `src/file1.ts`
- [ ] `src/file2.ts`
- [ ] `tests/file1.test.ts`

### Dependencies
<!-- List any new dependencies or external APIs needed -->

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Code implemented according to specification
- [ ] All tests passing (unit + integration)
- [ ] Performance requirements met
- [ ] Security requirements met
- [ ] Code follows project standards

## Definition of Ready
- [ ] Requirements clearly defined
- [ ] Technical approach decided
- [ ] Dependencies available
- [ ] Development environment set up
- [ ] Test scenarios identified

## Definition of Done Checklist
- [ ] Code implementation complete
- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Integration tests passing  
- [ ] Performance testing complete
- [ ] Security testing complete
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] API documentation updated (OpenAPI)
- [ ] Error handling implemented
- [ ] Logging implemented for monitoring
- [ ] PR linked to this issue

## Testing Strategy
### Unit Tests
- [ ] Core logic tested
- [ ] Edge cases covered
- [ ] Error scenarios tested

### Integration Tests  
- [ ] API endpoints tested
- [ ] Database operations tested
- [ ] External dependencies tested

### E2E Tests
- [ ] User workflows tested
- [ ] Browser compatibility tested
- [ ] Performance scenarios tested

## Performance Requirements
- Response time: < 500ms
- Throughput: 100 req/s
- Memory usage: < 512MB

## Security Requirements
- [ ] Input validation
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization
- [ ] Rate limiting
- [ ] Data encryption
- [ ] SQL injection protection

## Monitoring & Observability
- [ ] Metrics added
- [ ] Logging implemented  
- [ ] Tracing added
- [ ] Health check endpoint

## Rollout Plan
- [ ] Feature flag configuration
- [ ] Staging deployment
- [ ] Production deployment
- [ ] Monitoring setup
- [ ] Rollback plan

## Dependencies & Blockers
- **Blocked By**: #[issue-number]
- **Blocks**: #[issue-number]

## Priority
- **Urgency**: [Critical/High/Medium/Low]
- **Complexity**: [Simple/Medium/Complex]
- **Estimated Effort**: [Hours/Days/Weeks]

## Additional Context
<!-- Any additional information, screenshots, or references -->

---
**Remember**: Update the issue status as work progresses
- In Progress when development starts
- Code Review when ready for review  
- QA Ready when ready for testing
- Done when fully complete
